title: God's Providence.
content:
If all transgressions here should have their pay,
    What need there then be of a reckoning day?
    If God should punish no sin here of men,
    His providence who would not question then?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Providence.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
